highlights.description: Initial release of the ProductBuildersHQ Product Development Lifecycle (PDLC): the normative specification plus a Go module that classifies a project repository against the layout contract and evaluates readiness for handoff to a builder

Readiness evaluation emits a structured-evaluation report scoring each in-scope domain on artifact presence and, where a tool has run, quality — with unrun tools held at conditional rather than passing silently

added.description: Layout contract as Go types with an embedded layout.yaml: canonical paths, per-profile requirement levels, authority, and detection heuristics for every product-definition artifact
Repository classifier that skips immovable (tool-native) and ignored (templates, examples, fixtures) directories, flags path conflicts, and never auto-proposes moves from content-only matches
pdlc.yaml project manifest with profile selection and per-domain override resolution
Readiness evaluator producing a structured-evaluation report: checklist-scale presence, leaf-report quality, and TOOL_NOT_RUN semantics for unrun tools
pdlc CLI (Cobra) with check, inventory, init, and layout commands
Go-first JSON Schema generation for the layout and project manifests, embedded for programmatic access

PDLC specification: lifecycle stages, canonical project layout, review-site assembly, quality evaluation, requirement registry and executable acceptance tests, agent-driven adoption, and the Product Baseline handoff contract

tests.description: Coverage for layout classification (immovable protection, misplaced-artifact detection, conflicts) and readiness evaluation (override semantics, TOOL_NOT_RUN, conditional readiness, locale coverage, profile scaling, idempotence)

dependencies.description: Add github.com/invopop/jsonschema for Go-first schema generation
